title: Water Supply Disruption on 25th June
content: Due to maintenance work on the overhead tank, water supply will be disrupted on 25th June 2024 from 10 AM to 2 PM. Please store water in advance. We regret the inconvenience.

title: AGM Meeting – 26th June at 10 AM
content: Annual General Meeting of NivassHub Society is scheduled on 26th June 2024 at 10:00 AM in the Community Hall. All flat owners are requested to attend. Agenda: Budget approval, maintenance fee revision, election of new committee members.

title: Maintenance Fee Due – June 2024
content: Monthly maintenance fee for June 2024 is due. Amount: ₹2,400 per flat. Last date: 30th June 2024. Late payment will attract a fine of ₹100 per day. Please pay via the society office or bank transfer.

title: Pest Control – 27th June
content: Scheduled pest control treatment for all common areas and basement parking on 27th June 2024 from 9 AM to 12 PM. Residents are advised to keep pets indoors and close windows during this period.

title: Swimming Pool Closed for Maintenance
content: The swimming pool will remain closed from 24th to 26th June 2024 for filter replacement and water treatment. The pool will reopen on 27th June 2024. We apologize for the inconvenience.

title: No Parking – Society Event on 28th June
content: Due to a society event on 28th June 2024 in the club house, parking near Block A and Club House will be restricted from 4 PM to 11 PM. Residents are requested to use the basement parking.

title: New Security Guard Deployment
content: Two new security guards have been deployed at Gate 1 for night duty (10 PM – 6 AM). All residents are requested to show ID cards when entering after 10 PM. Visitor vehicles must register at gate.

title: Garbage Timing Change
content: Garbage collection timings have been revised. New timings: Morning – 7:30 AM to 9:00 AM. Evening – 6:00 PM to 7:30 PM. Residents are requested not to leave garbage bags outside these timings.

title: Diwali Celebration – Volunteers Needed
content: Society is planning grand Diwali celebrations in October. We need volunteers for decoration, event coordination, and food. Interested residents can contact the society office or Cultural Committee WhatsApp group.

title: CCTV Upgrade Completed
content: CCTV camera network upgrade has been completed. All 24 cameras are now HD quality with 30-day recording. Two new cameras added at basement parking. Feed can be monitored at security cabin.

title: Tree Trimming – Common Areas
content: Tree trimming and garden maintenance work scheduled on 29th and 30th June 2024. Residents are advised to keep vehicles away from garden areas on those days.

title: Society Rules Reminder – Noise Policy
content: Reminder: As per society bylaws, loud music, TV, or any disturbance is not permitted after 10:00 PM on weekdays and 11:00 PM on weekends. Violations will attract a fine of ₹500 per complaint. Cooperation expected.

title: New Resident Welcome – Flat D-201
content: We warmly welcome Mr. & Mrs. Uma Shankar to NivassHub! They have moved into Flat D-201. The society committee requests all residents to extend a warm welcome to our new neighbors.

title: Emergency Contact Numbers Updated
content: Updated emergency contact numbers have been shared on the society WhatsApp group and notice board. Key contacts: Police – 100, Fire – 101, Ambulance – 108, Society Security – 9900112233, Society Office – 9900223344.

title: Electricity Bill for Common Areas – May 2024
content: The electricity bill for common areas for May 2024 was ₹48,500. This has been paid from the society maintenance fund. Detailed statement available at the society office upon request.
